title: Honey Lead
description: This datapack allows you to craft Leads with Honeycombs in addition to Slimeballs, providing an alternative recipe.
body:
This datapack adds an alternative recipe for crafting Leads, allowing you to use Honeycombs in addition to Slimeballs. Now you have more flexibility in obtaining Leads without relying solely on Slimes or Wandering Traders!

Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.4 and designed to work seamlessly with other datapacks.
